text: In this first space, amid the stark modern architecture, I feel a certain emptiness—an echo punctuated by the polished lines and artificial lights. The room is half-awake, alert with the possibility of gatherings, yet presently hollow. The second space, vibrant with creative display and the language of research and development, excites a different curiosity in me. Here, I am inspired and engaged, surrounded by evidence of human curiosity and ingenuity. I feel a sense of connection with others who question and imagine, eager for dialogue in this theatre of ideas.
